What is the difference between MAG X870 TOMAHAWK WIFI and X870 aorus elite Wi-Fi 7?
related_questions.snippet: MSI MAG X870 Tomahawk WiFi and GIGABYTE X870 AORUS Elite WIFI7 are both motherboards with the same Socket (AM5), Form factor (ATX) and Chipset (AMD X870). The main differences are in Supported Memory, Audio Chipset, Max LAN Speed and Back I/O Ports.
